__classcell__r
UpdatingDefaultsHelpFormatterz
Custom help formatter for use in ConfigOptionParser.
    This is updates the defaults before expanding them, allowing
    them to show up correctly in the help listing.
    Also redact auth from url type options
    r
URL)

t	yx
Updates the given defaults with values from the config files and
        the environ. Does a little special handling for certain types of
        options (lists).z

countr
{} is not a valid value for {} option, please instead specify either a non-negative integer or a boolean value like yes/no or false/true which is equivalent to 1/0.r(

        the option parser possible, _update_defaults() does the dirty work.N)
